title: Unlock Your Job Types
subtitle: Choose which jobs you want to receive. The more specific, the better your matches.
trustLine: Better matching = more quality leads you actually want

progress.hint: Unlock at least {{min}} to start receiving matched leads

browse.emptyHint: Unlock your first job type to get started

preferences.title: Set Your Priorities
preferences.subtitle: Tell us which jobs you love vs prefer to avoid

wizard.jumpToStep: Jump to any step and update your details.

basicInfo.title: Tell us about yourself
basicInfo.description: This is what clients will see when they view your profile.
basicInfo.whyThisMatters: 💡 Clients hire people they trust. A real name and phone number makes you look professional and helps us reach you fast when work comes in.
basicInfo.phoneHint: We'll send you WhatsApp notifications about new jobs — you'll never miss a lead
basicInfo.businessNameOptional: (optional — skip if you trade under your own name)
basicInfo.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. Reliable electrician with 15+ years experience
basicInfo.taglineHint: A short headline that appears with your name — think of it like your van sign
basicInfo.bioPlaceholder: What do you do best? How long have you been doing it? Clients love hearing about real experience — keep it simple, no waffle needed.
basicInfo.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

serviceArea.title: Where do you work?
serviceArea.description: Tap the areas of Ibiza where you're happy to take jobs.
serviceArea.whyThisMatters: 💡 We only send you jobs in YOUR areas — no wasted time driving across the island for nothing.
serviceArea.islandWide: Great! You'll receive jobs from across Ibiza
serviceArea.islandWideTileDesc: We'll match you with jobs anywhere in Ibiza.
serviceArea.selectAtLeast: Please select at least one area

serviceUnlock.title: Which jobs do you want?
serviceUnlock.description: Tap any job you're happy to do. We'll only send you these.
serviceUnlock.whyThisMatters: 💡 This is the most important step. Every job you tick is a type of work we'll send directly to you. More ticks = more leads. You won't get spammed — only real client requests.
serviceUnlock.noNeedAll: You don't need to select everything — just the work you actually want.
serviceUnlock.addMoreLater: You can always add or remove jobs later — nothing is locked in.
serviceUnlock.selectMinimum: Select at least 1 job to continue
serviceUnlock.tapToSelect: Tap any job you're happy to do
serviceUnlock.tapToPrioritise: Tap a selected job to set priority

review.readyDescription: Everything looks good. Hit the button and you'll start getting real job leads.
review.almostDescription: Complete the items below to go live.
review.whyThisMatters: 💡 Once you're live, clients posting jobs in your categories will land in your dashboard automatically. No cold calling needed.
review.sendJobsFor: We'll only send you jobs for:
review.changeAnytime: You can change all of this anytime from your dashboard — nothing is set in stone.
review.completeAll: Complete all checklist items to go live
review.liveSuccess: 🎉 You're live! Sit back — when a client posts a matching job, it'll appear in your dashboard.
review.goLiveFailed: Failed to go live. Please try again.
